basics.name: PARAS WANJARI
basics.title: Java Developer
basics.summary: Java Developer with 4.6 years of experience designing and optimizing enterprise applications using Spring Boot and JPA. Experienced in designing and implementing asynchronous programming solutions using Apache Kafka and RabbitMQ for high-throughput, event-driven backend systems and efficient message streaming. Experienced in implementing secure Single Sign-On (SSO) with Keycloak and OAuth 2.0, managing access for 10,000+ users. Proficient in integrating third-party APIs in domains such as payment processing and email/calendar communication to enhance functionality and streamline workflows. Strong problem solver and collaborative team player, delivering scalable, high-impact backend solutions aligned with business goals.

bullets: Joined Tata Consultancy Services on 22 December 2025
Migrated core backend processes of a legacy Bravura Sonata wealth management system from batch to a real-time streaming architecture using Apache Kafka, reducing data processing latency by 70%.
Developed Kafka producers to publish PAS object change events generated from the Sonata system, processing over 1 million events daily with 99.9% reliability.
Integrated Kafka with backend microservices previously reliant on Sonata’s batch services, increasing claims data ingestion throughput by 3x.
Improved dashboard responsiveness by replacing periodic batch updates from Sonata with event-triggered Kafka streams, enhancing UI refresh rates by 40%.
Created comprehensive technical documentation detailing the migration from Sonata’s batch architecture to a Kafka-driven event system to support team knowledge sharing and maintenance.

Engineered the architecture and deployment of Alore Growth OS projects, resulting in a 50 % reduction in customer onboarding time, implemented targeted features that supported over 1,000 active users monthly.

Executed the implementation of Keycloak-based Single Sign-On (SSO), which provided seamless authentication and access management for over 1,000 users, ultimately increasing user satisfaction and reducing internal security incidents.
Implemented OAuth 2.0 authentication mechanisms for Google and Outlook, ensuring secure and seamless user access across platforms.
Led the integration and utilization of third-party APIs, including Nylas, enhancing application capabilities and streamlining data interactions
Engineered the comprehensive implementation of Stripe APIs, optimizing the payment processing system to ensure a streamlined and efficient payment flow.
Implemented messaging solutions using JMS (RabbitMQ), leading to a 30% communication efficiency
Implemented Redis caching on high-traffic APIs, reducing average response time by 40 % lowering backend load under peak usage
Designed and implemented a client data dashboard to showcase key metrics such as open rates, bounce rates, and replies.
Achieved a 25% increase in data visualization efficacy, facilitating more accurate analysis of client engagement metrics for enhanced team insights.
Implemented data validation measures, ensuring a 90% accuracy rate in metric reporting.
Enhanced dashboard responsiveness, resulting in a 20% reduction in data retrieval latency.
